title: 皐月賞の後に・ただ燃え尽きて……

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... I'm shredded... But I'm not talking about
how good I look...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Every muscle in my body is throbbing... I don't
have any energy left...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hehehe... Sure was. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Wow, I did it... Everything I've done up till now
hasn't been for nothing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I still can't believe I'm running in the Classics. On
top of that, I've never been more happy to see
my number on the scoreboard.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
What a relief... I'm so happy. Honestly, I'd be
happy even if this were my very last race.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: What do you mean? We're just getting started!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ines?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Um, uh... Nice running today!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ryan! Don't forget about the next race.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Because next up is the Classic of all Classics, the
Japanese Derby. ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
If you keep running like today, then you could
definitely run in the Derby. Congrats!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: You're congratulating me? But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Me... in the Derby? I haven't really thought that
far ahead, to be honest.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I figured as much. But now you can start putting it
in that muscly head of yours.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: We can make that race a competition between us!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Anyway, see ya! I'm gonna head home.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and remember—there's no competing allowed
in our room. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: The Derby... Trainer, did you hear that?
choice_data_list: Yeah. Let's get ready for it.
Yeah. Let's get ready for it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: O-okay... but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Could I just rest here a bit? I'd like to bask in the
moment a little more...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A cool spring breeze lightly blows across Mejiro
Ryan's flush face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the first round of the Classics, the Satsuki
Sho, comes to a close.
